Defaults.comment: Paket is used to restore various dependencies (including the Brownserve.PSTools PowerShell module).`nWe deliberately ignore the 'paket.lock' file as our projects are usually not precious about taking the latest versions of packages.
The temporary directory is used to store build output, log files, redirected output etc. It is recreated by the _init.ps1 script.
AI coding tool directories contain local/personal configuration and session data that should not be committed.

WebApp.comment: Environment files often contain secrets and should never be committed.
